title: 3 Legal and Policy Considerations
body_text:
3	Legal and Policy Considerations
3.1 	Proceeds of Crime (Money Laundering) and Terrorist Financing Act and Regulations (Canada)
The
Proceeds of Crime (Money Laundering) and Terrorist Financing Act (PCMLTFA)
and
PCMLTF Regulations
apply to financial institutions and their agents (e.g., deposit-taking agents). Contact your AML Compliance Officer or FINTRAC for more information. Subscribers to the Operations Manual Program can also refer to the PCMLTFA Compliance Part.
3.2	Establishing Policies for Setting Interac e-Transfer
Â®
Limits
Financial institutions wanting to participate in Central 1âs Limit Groups feature should do an internal risk assessment to determine which limit group they would like to participate in.
END
